Description: Authenticate connections by player ID. Creates a session, loads player data from a JSON file (or creates a new one), and returns a full player snapshot.

playerId.Description: Player ID, e.g. 'Player1', 'Player2'. Latin letters, digits, '-' and '_'.

Description: Test command: changes one player parameter. The change is applied in memory and saved to the JSON file when the connection is closed.

value.Description: New value for the parameter. In the example, a number is shown; at runtime, any value is accepted (number, string, object).

Description: Player started or restarted a level — 1 unit of energy is consumed. If energy dropped below the maximum, the recovery timer is started.
Player won a level — 1 unit of energy is granted back (capped at the maximum). Together with level-start this nets to zero, so a win effectively does not cost energy.
Trigger for the timer of a game entity. For energy, it credits all fully elapsed recovery cycles (1 unit per interval) and restarts the count if the maximum has not yet been reached.

type.Description: Type of the game entity with a timer.
